progress_summary: Two ad-hoc UX-engineer engagements this session: B-10 color-contrast token decision (RESOLVED) and architecture-diagram auto-cycle restoration (SHIPPED). No active sprint or design spec — operating in plugin/eval mode against a live site.

key_decisions: B-10: Light --success moved from #047857 (emerald-700) to #065F46 (emerald-800). Lifts .card-role-tag[data-role=success] from 3.64:1 to 5.10:1; also lifts ribbon (4.04→5.66) and surface (4.43→6.20). Tailwind ramp preserved; visual identity drift minimal. Pre-computed mix bg also moved from #d0d5bd to #d0d1ba so Axe sees the same value color-mix(--success 15%, --surface) renders at runtime.
B-10 audit doc (roadmap/B-10-color-contrast-audit.md) was stale on session start — its 'hard fails' had already been patched in main. Round 2 added a resolution log so the doc reflects actual state.

/architecture had 47 inline on*="..." event handler attributes that Sprint 7c's CSP (script-src 'self' 'nonce-...' 'strict-dynamic') silently blocked. Bound them via addEventListener inside the existing nonce-blessed <script is:inline>. Window.* exports removed since nothing else relied on them.

Architecture animations (CP clockwise build, orchestrator routing decision) were intent-original auto-running but gated on cp-mode/orch-mode classes that only got applied on click. Added autoCycleArch() — 1s settle → CP open → 7.5s build → close → orch open → 5s routing → close. Cancels on first user interaction. Skips on prefers-reduced-motion.
shipped_prs: PR #136 — fix(B-10): darken light --success to clear AA-normal on /skills role tag (squashed to 8fdc3d5)
PR #138 — fix(architecture): wire diagram events via addEventListener for CSP (squashed to f9d9cd6)
PR #139 — feat(architecture): one-shot auto-cycle on page load (squashed to 00e159c)
user_preferences: Direct, concise communication — short answers, no padding
Asks questions via AskUserQuestion when given the option
Prefers token-level fixes over per-component overrides (preserves the design-token-as-contract principle)
Wants animations to feel alive on load — auto-running over hover-only

next_actions: Manual deploy via `npm run deploy:staging` then `npm run deploy` — staging.opchain.dev and opchain.dev are NOT auto-updated by merging to main (per CLAUDE.md, deploys are manual)
Eyeball the deployed /architecture page: confirm CP panel auto-opens, 6-box clockwise build animates, closes, orch panel opens, routing decision plays, closes
Eyeball the deployed /skills page: confirm role-success tag has the new emerald-800 fg and that visual identity doesn't feel jarring

B-11 follow-on: drop COLOR_CONTRAST_DISABLE from the other 6 routes one at a time. /architecture, /install, /skills/<id>, /demo, /privacy, /styleguide. Each should be Axe-clean now that tokens are fixed but verify per-route before flipping. Run the per-route Axe disable removal in a small PR per route, or batch the obvious clean ones.

alternatives_considered: #055747 (slightly deeper, off-Tailwind ramp) — rejected: marginal benefit, breaks ramp
#054d3a (visibly darker forest-green) — rejected: too much identity drift
Override .card-role-tag[data-role=success] locally — rejected: violates token-as-contract principle

arch_animation_decisions.auto_cycle_shape: play once on load, then settle
arch_animation_decisions.reduced_motion: skip cycle entirely if prefers-reduced-motion: reduce
